g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the scheduling algorithms: First Fit, Best Fit, Round Robin, Least Load')
sendPrompt('Explain how the cluster manager handles node and pod CRUD')
sendPrompt('Explain the health monitor: failure detection, auto-eviction, and recovery')

g.text: Real-time nodes, pods, metrics via WebSocket

svg.text: 1. API server receives requests (create node, schedule pod)
2. Cluster manager updates state, scheduler picks placement
3. Health monitor detects failures, triggers re-scheduling
4. Events and metrics stream to dashboard in real-time
